title: Creaking CPVP Pack
description: A clean and crisp CPVP Pack designed to improve your Crystal PVP Skills by updating the boring old textures with a polished new look!
body:
Creaking CPVP offers the **best** looks by updating the textures of
- Crystals
- Obsidian
- Totems of Undying
- Golden Apples
- Ender Pearls
- Bows and Crossbows
- Anchors
- Glowstone
 
**WHILE** improving the overall experience by
- removing explosion particles
- adding a charge indicator for bows and crossbows
- small totem
